---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## How to maintain this page

Replace the examples below with your papers. For each entry, include authors,
title, venue, year, and links (DOI, PDF, code, data). Preprints can be marked
with *Under review* or *Preprint*.
:::

## Peer-reviewed

1. **Mustun, F.**, Coauthor, A., & Coauthor, B. (2026).
   *[Paper title in sentence case].*
   *Journal or Conference Name*.
   [DOI](https://doi.org) · [PDF](https://example.com) · [Code](https://github.com)

2. Coauthor, A., **Mustun, F.**, & Coauthor, B. (2025).
   *[Paper title].*
   *Venue*.
   [DOI](https://doi.org) · [PDF](https://example.com)

## Preprints & working papers

1. **Mustun, F.** et al. (2026).
   *[Working paper title].*
   *arXiv preprint*.
   [arXiv](https://arxiv.org) · [PDF](https://example.com)

## Theses & reports

1. **Mustun, F.** (20XX).
   *[Thesis title].*
   [Degree], [University].
   [PDF](files/thesis.pdf)

## Talks & posters

- **[Talk title]** — *Event, Location, Year*. [Slides](https://example.com)
- **[Poster title]** — *Conference, Year*. [PDF](https://example.com)
